Type.Title: Naruto
Type.Author: Masashi Kishimoto
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled Naruto.

Volume.Info_about_volume: Naruto Uzumaki dreams of becoming Hokage but faces challenges as a mischievous outcast ninja. His journey begins here.
Team 7 faces their first real mission: protecting Tazuna the bridge builder from Zabuza Momochi, a deadly rogue ninja.
Naruto, Sasuke, and Sakura continue their intense battle against Haku and Zabuza in the Land of Waves.
Naruto awakens the true power of determination as the bridge mission reaches its climax with the death of Zabuza.
The Chūnin Exam begins! Naruto and his friends face other talented Genin and the mysterious Gaara of the Sand.
The Chūnin Exams turn deadly as Orochimaru appears and targets Sasuke, revealing a dark future ahead.
The fight continues inside the Forest of Death. Team 7 learns teamwork under the pressure of real danger.
The preliminary matches begin. Rock Lee vs Gaara shocks everyone with its intensity and tragedy.
Neji and Hinata, both Hyuga clan members, face each other in a battle that exposes deep family wounds.
Naruto faces Kiba in the tournament, revealing unexpected tactics and growth as a ninja.

Type.Title: One Piece
Type.Author: Eiichiro Oda
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled One Piece.

Type.Title: My Hero Academia
Type.Author: Kohei Horikoshi
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled My Hero Academia.

Volume.Info_about_volume: Monkey D. Luffy sets sail to become King of the Pirates! The adventure begins as he gathers his first crew members.
Luffy and Zoro face off against the colorful but dangerous Buggy the Clown and his pirate crew.
Luffy continues his journey and faces a scheming pirate captain who preys on villages with false heroics.
Luffy and his crew help protect Kaya from Captain Kuro and his Black Cat Pirates.
The Straw Hats' next destination introduces Usopp’s dreams and courage as danger looms closer.
Luffy and crew clash with the cunning Captain Kuro in a fight that tests their resolve as pirates.
After gaining Usopp, the Straw Hat Pirates set sail to the floating restaurant Baratie and meet Sanji.
Luffy battles Don Krieg at the Baratie, while Sanji’s tragic past and noble spirit are revealed.
Luffy finally defeats Don Krieg, and Nami’s mysterious betrayal leads the Straw Hats to Arlong Park.
The crew stands with Nami against Arlong, beginning the legendary battle that defines loyalty and friendship.

Type.Title: Jujutsu Kaisen
Type.Author: Gege Akutami
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled Jujutsu Kaisen.

Volume.Info_about_volume: Yuji Itadori swallows a cursed object and is thrust into the world of jujutsu sorcerers.
Itadori and his friends face off against a powerful curse in a high-security detention facility. :contentReference[oaicite:2]{index=2}
Team hunts curses while learning the price of power.
The Kyoto Sister-School Exchange event begins and chaos erupts.
The events escalate: powerful sorcerers and curses clash in a deadly showdown.
The battle continues as more secrets are revealed about the jujutsu world.
A curse-free battle? Hardly. The stakes rise for Itadori and friends.
The Kyoto Event reaches its climax — allies and enemies alike are revealed.
The aftermath: a major loss and a new direction for the characters.
Preparations begin for the next major arc: new threats loom on the horizon.

Type.Title: Attack on Titan
Type.Author: Hajime Isayama
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled Attack on Titan.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 1: To You, in 2000 Years
Volume.Info_about_volume: The fall of Wall Maria begins as Titans breach humanity’s last defenses, setting Eren Yeager on a path of vengeance.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 2: That Day
Volume.Info_about_volume: Eren joins the military and begins his training, determined to destroy all Titans after a shocking transformation.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 3: Night of the Disbanding Ceremony
Volume.Info_about_volume: The trainees graduate and are thrust into a deadly battle when Titans appear within Wall Rose.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 4: The Female Titan
Volume.Info_about_volume: The Survey Corps venture outside the walls and encounter a mysterious Female Titan with terrifying power.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 5: A Choice with No Regrets
Volume.Info_about_volume: Levi and Erwin make impossible decisions as humanity pushes deeper into Titan territory.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 6: The Defeated
Volume.Info_about_volume: Eren’s Titan powers are tested as humanity’s hope clashes against fear and distrust within the walls.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 7: Small Blade
Volume.Info_about_volume: The mystery deepens as the Survey Corps begin uncovering the truth behind the Titans’ origins.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 8: No Regrets
Volume.Info_about_volume: Levi’s backstory unfolds, showing how his loyalty to Erwin was forged amid tragedy and bloodshed.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 9: Wall Rose’s Secrets
Volume.Info_about_volume: The shocking truth about the walls begins to surface, challenging everything humanity believed.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Attack on Titan Vol. 10: The Armored Titan
Volume.Info_about_volume: Eren faces the shocking revelation of Reiner and Bertholdt’s true identities in a devastating battle.

Type.Title: Bleach
Type.Author: Tite Kubo
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled Bleach.

Volume.Info_about_volume: Ichigo Kurosaki, a high schooler who can see ghosts, accidentally absorbs the powers of Soul Reaper Rukia Kuchiki, beginning his duty to protect the living from Hollows.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 2: Goodbye Parakeet, Goodnight My Sista
Volume.Info_about_volume: Ichigo continues his Hollow-slaying duties while Orihime and Chad discover their own spiritual powers when a Hollow attacks.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 3: Memories in the Rain
Volume.Info_about_volume: Ichigo faces a Hollow born from his mother’s killer, revealing the trauma and guilt that shaped him.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 4: Quincy Archer Hates You
Volume.Info_about_volume: Uryu Ishida, a Quincy, challenges Ichigo to a contest to see who can slay more Hollows, leading to chaos in Karakura Town.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 5: Rightarm of the Giant
Volume.Info_about_volume: Chad’s mysterious arm powers awaken as Ichigo and his friends face a massive Hollow threat and learn the true nature of spiritual energy.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 6: The Death Trilogy Overture
Volume.Info_about_volume: Rukia’s past is revealed as Soul Society’s enforcers arrive to arrest her, setting up a confrontation that will change Ichigo’s fate forever.
Ichigo undergoes training with Urahara to regain his powers and prepare for the rescue of Rukia in Soul Society.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 8: The Blade and Me
Volume.Info_about_volume: Ichigo’s soul-cutting blade, Zangetsu, manifests as he begins to understand the true nature of his power.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 9: Fourteen Days for Conspiracy
Volume.Info_about_volume: Ichigo and his allies enter Soul Society, encountering fierce Shinigami captains guarding Rukia’s prison.

Volume.Currentvolume_name: Bleach Vol. 10: Tattoo on the Sky
Volume.Info_about_volume: Ichigo faces off against Captain Zaraki Kenpachi in a brutal fight that defines the next stage of his journey.

Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled Fairy Tail.

Type.Title: Black Clover
Type.Author: Yūki Tabata
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled Black Clover.

Type.Title: Dr. Stone
Type.Author: Riichiro Inagaki
Aboutmanga: A popular shonen manga titled Dr. Stone.
